title: Market Analytics Manager
description:
We are seeking a skilled Market Analytics Manager, Semiconductor to lead market intelligence, addressable market insights, and strategic analytics across the semiconductor ecosystem, with coverage of the semiconductor market alongside products, applications, and technologies. This role will steward data integrity, build robust reporting and dashboard solutions, and partner with cross-regional business stakeholders (internal & external) to deliver insights that influence strategic business decisions across product, technology, and commercial teams.

Semiconductor Market & Addressable Market Analysis

  • Define and maintain comprehensive Total Addressable Market (TAM) models covering different geographical semiconductor markets, including materials, devices, applications and technologies.

  • Analyze market size, growth rates, competitive dynamics, customer demand, and material-specific trends (e.g., wafer fabrication and packaging materials, specialty gases, photoresists, etc.) that drive the semiconductor materials industry.

  • Segment markets by products, industries, applications and technology nodes to support strategic planning and prioritization across regions.

Data Integrity, Governance & Reporting Frameworks

  • Ensure integrity of market data through monitoring, governance frameworks, and process controls, while streamlining the end-to-end data-reporting lifecycle for global and regional datasets.

  • Develop and deliver data and reporting outputs through continuously gather inputs from cross-functional and cross-regional teams to define and refine data elements, enhancing market data relevancy and accuracy.

  • Establish scalable processes for data curation, validation, maintenance, and quality assurance.

Dashboards, Visualization & Analytics

  • Build and maintain interactive dashboards (e.g., Tableau) to visualize market trends, materials segmentation, forecasts, KPIs, and competitive landscapes for business leaders across different geographical region.

  • Steer management toward data-driven decision-making by revamping dashboards, automating reporting, and generating analytical insights that influence strategic outcomes.

  • Partner with data engineering and analytics teams to standardize BI tools and reporting workflows for both regional and global use.

Partnering with Business Stakeholders (Global & APAC)

  • Collaborate with product management, materials teams, technical application, commercial, finance, R&D, and operations across APAC and global functions to align data solutions with business needs.

  • Partner with internal stakeholders to deliver data solutions that provide insights, projections, measurable metrics, and performance tracking — including usage trends for semiconductor materials and related product portfolios.

  • Act as a trusted adviser on market data, trends, materials dynamics, and strategic insights to influence senior leadership decisions.

Qualifications

  • Master’s degree / PhD in Engineering, Materials Science, Economics, Data Science, Business Analytics, or a related field.

  • 10+ years’ experience in market analytics, strategic insights, or market research —within semiconductors or electronics high-tech sectors with global and APAC remit.

  • Strong expertise in addressable market modeling, materials segmentation, forecasting, data visualization, and reporting across products and materials markets.

  • Experience with semiconductor industry data sources (equipment, materials, fabrication, packaging) and research vendors covering Global & APAC markets.

  • Proven ability to manage large, complex datasets and ensure high standards of data integrity.

  • Proficiency with Tableau and dashboard development; experience with other BI/analytics platforms is a plus.

  • Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills with the ability to influence stakeholders and translate complex data into actionable business insights.
